Career Tracks

Structured pathways designed to take you from beginner to industry-ready professional

IT Foundation

Digital Literacy & Office

Master essential computing skills, MS Office, and digital fundamentals for career readiness.

6 MonthsLearn More

Design & Marketing

Creative + Digital Strategy

Learn Adobe tools, UI/UX design, SEO, and digital marketing for creative careers.

9-12 MonthsLearn More

IT & Cybersecurity

Networks + Security

Build expertise in IT support, networking, and cybersecurity protocols.

9-12 MonthsLearn More

Software Development

Code + Build Apps

Master programming, web development, and software engineering principles.

9-12 MonthsLearn More

Why Choose ETI Educom?

Discover what makes us the preferred choice for IT education

Industry-Aligned Curriculum

Courses designed with current market requirements

International Certifications

Microsoft, Adobe, EC-Council certifications

Practical Training

Hands-on projects and real-world scenarios

Placement Support

100% placement assistance for eligible students

Expert Faculty

Learn from industry professionals

Flexible Batches

Morning, evening, and weekend batches available

Student Success Stories

Hear from our students who have transformed their careers

ETI Educom transformed my career. The structured curriculum and practical training helped me land my dream job as a developer.

Rahul Sharma

Software Development

The Adobe certification I earned here opened many doors. Faculty support was exceptional throughout my journey.

Priya Patel

Digital Design & Marketing

From zero IT knowledge to a Network Administrator role in 8 months. ETI's structured approach made all the difference.

Amit Kumar

IT Support & Networking
